{{Quote|Here, try some. It's only a little — it can't hurt you|Sinthia Pulchatt|<ref name="GG7" />}}
'''Sinthia Pulchatt''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Kibnon/Legends|Kibnon]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]], who worked as a liaison between her own boss and the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. Groomed for the position from an early age, she worked in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] and was known to frequent [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]].<ref name="GG7" />
